1.name: ADJUSTMENT
1.description: Adjustment pin for the output voltage. Connect two external resistors to adjust the output voltage.

2.name: INPUT
2.description: Input voltage. The input voltage and current will be designated VI and II respectively. The package tab is also connected to this pin.

4.name: INPUT
4.description: Input voltage. The input voltage and current will be designated VI and II respectively. The package tab is also connected to this pin.

3.name: OUTPUT
3.description: Output voltage. The output voltage and current will be designated VO and IO respectively.

V(ESD).conditions: Human body model (HBM), per ANSI/ESDA/JEDEC JS-001, all pins

V(ESD)_Charged_device_model__CDM___pe.conditions: Charged device model (CDM), per JEDEC specification JESD22-C101, all pins
